title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft released seven in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1, Scout, Codename MDASH, and Majorana 2 as part of a full-stack strategy to compete with OpenAI. The moves include a reasoning model, an always-on agent, and advances in quantum hardware, positioning Microsoft as both OpenAI's partner and competitor.
